description: something horn-like, i.e., (specially) the apex of a hebrew letter (figuratively, the least particle)
origin: feminine of a presumed derivative of the base of g2768
notes: the title is analogous to the dot of an "i" in english. jesus used it to refer to the little lines by which the hebrew letters, in other respects similar, differ from one another; the meaning is, "not even the minutest part of the law shall perish."
